content.full_text:
FPPC

City of Lake Elsinore MAY 15 857 AM '90

CITY HALL
130 SOUTH MAIN STREET
LAKE ELSINORE, CALIFORNIA 92330

Telephone (714) 674-3125

May 11, 1990

Fair Political Practices Commission
Post Office Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95804-0807

Gentlemen:

As you will see from the enclosed letter, City of Lake Elsinore
Councilmember Jim Winkler has been appointed as the City's
representative on the Western Riverside Association of
Governments. A copy of the formative agreement for this
organization is also enclosed for your review.

Our questions are: What increased filing requirements will be
necessary to keep him in compliance with the codes? And will he
need to expand his reporting area with regard to real property?
Any assistance you can provide will be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your assistance.

Sincerely,

VICKI KASAD, CITY CLERK
CITY OF LAKE ELSINORE

Enclosures

cc: Jim Winkler

City of Lake Elsinore
CITY HALL
130 SOUTH MAIN STREET
LAKE ELSINORE, CALIFORNIA 92330

Telephone (714) 674-3125


May 10, 1990


Michelle Zimmerman
Administrative Offices
County of Riverside
4080 Lemon Street
Riverside, CA  92501

Dear Michelle:

The City Council of the City of Lake Elsinore at their meeting of
April 24, 1990, appointed Councilman Jim Winkler as their delegate
to the Western Riverside Council of Governments and Mayor Gary
Washburn as the alternate.

If you have any questions, or need additional information, please
don't hesitate to call (714) 674-3124 ext. 262.

Sincerely,

[handwritten signature]
VICKI KASAD, CITY CLERK
CITY OF LAKE ELSINORE
